test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verifies that the health check endpoint returns status 'ok'

test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with valid data

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author without a name returns a validation error

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that authors can be listed with pagination parameters

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be retrieved by ID

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verifies that a 304 is returned when the author hasn't been modified (ETag match)

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with a mismatched ETag returns 412

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author without associated books can be deleted

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns 409

test_cases.name: create_category_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a category can be created with valid data

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a duplicate category returns 409

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be created with valid data

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns 409

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verifies that books can be listed with various filters (author, category, price range)

test_cases.name: list_books_excludes_soft_deleted
test_cases.description: Verifies that soft-deleted books are excluded from the list

test_cases.name: get_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be retrieved by ID

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be updated with valid data

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be soft-deleted

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a soft-deleted book can be restored

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a new book returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_rate_limit_exceeded
test_cases.description: Verifies that exceeding the rate limit for discounts returns 429

test_cases.name: update_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that the stock can be updated with a valid quantity

test_cases.name: update_stock_below_zero
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating stock to a negative value returns 400

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a review can be created for a book
